title: Testing with TypeScript Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on TypeScript testing patterns.

questions.question: Regarding the testing of TypeScript code, what is the primary role of 'ts-jest'?
options: To allow Jest to correctly process and test TypeScript code our project

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using TypeScript within your automated tests?
options: It provides static type checking for your test code, helping catch errors early
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
